summary: Successfully resolved the OS Error 87 on Windows during receipt file creation. The dependency-advisory-graph skill passes all harness assertions with 0 errors. Patched the store.rs to replace colon characters with dashes for Windows file system compatibility.
observations: Command run: cargo run -p runx-cli -- harness --receipt-dir temp_receipts skills/dependency-advisory-graph
